title: Bhavana
key_questions: Why is bhavana broader than the English word meditation?
How does bhavana relate to samatha and vipassana?
When does bhavana refer to a general path of cultivation rather than a technique?
How should modern mindfulness and self-development uses be distinguished from classical Buddhist cultivation?
disambiguation_notes: Do not equate bhavana with generic relaxation practice.
Do not collapse Buddhist cultivation, clinical mindfulness, and productivity-oriented attention training.
Track source tradition, method, object, goal, and claim type for each assertion.
